scripts.test: biome check && npm run build-tests && env TZ=UTC node --test '.build/tests/**/*.test.js'
scripts.refresh: rm -rf node_modules/ && rm package-lock.json && npm i
scripts.homey-build: npm run build && npm run bundle-varMgmt && npm run test && homey app build
scripts.homey-run: npm run homey-build && homey app run --remote
scripts.homey-run-clean: npm run homey-build && homey app run --remote --clean
scripts.homey-install: npm run homey-build && homey app install
scripts.homey-publish: npm run homey-build && homey app publish
